caption:
🚨Too many athletes suffer in silence, and it needs to stop.

Fear, manipulation, and retaliation should never be part of sports, yet they happen behind closed doors. And when athletes speak up? They’re met with silence, doubt, or punishment.

Disclaimer—I don’t believe all NCAA or elite programs are like this, yet far too many cases like this remain unspoken leaving athletes to feel broken down, unseen, or left questioning their worth. Their stories matter.

No dream is worth losing yourself over. Speaking up isn’t easy, but it’s necessary. Healing isn’t just about walking away, it’s about learning to trust yourself again, rebuilding confidence, and redefining what strength really means.

This is why I’m so passionate about helping current, former athletes, & high achievers break free from self-doubt, rebuild their confidence, and take back control of their mind, body, and performance on their own terms. Because you deserve to feel strong, capable, and in control—not just in sport, but in life.

I’m beyond grateful for those who have encouraged and inspired me to speak up.

If you’ve experienced abusive coaching, @endabusivecoaching has an anonymous platform where you can share your story to help put an end to toxic coaching cultures.

These organizations are inspiring real change:
🏅 @hopeforathletes
🏅 @thedarksideofsport
🏅 @endabusivecoaching
🏅 @5wins_sports
🏅@athletesbettertogether
🏅 @morgansmessage 

🚨 Please Share this. Someone out there needs this reminder today
